changelog:
- memory leak fixes, spoilers rendering optimizations
- suggestions in search field (bugs.telegram.org/c/61045, 10👍)
- dont make app pop up after missed call (bugs.telegram.org/c/45101, 7👍)
- fix viewing public profile video, no videos in profile photo privacy page (bugs.telegram.org/c/23708, 4👍)
- story button in groups (bugs.telegram.org/c/37305, 1👍)
- fixed no folders on external share (bugs.telegram.org/c/59595)
- support input(Peer)UserFromMessage, input(Peer)ChannelFromMessage (bugs.telegram.org/c/60850)
- fix formatting in search results (bugs.telegram.org/c/61093)
- attach button in stories, too (bugs.telegram.org/c/56572), fix glitch closing video story
- fixed avatars in live locations view (bugs.telegram.org/c/44640)
- fix sending thumb inside music document, show cover from local music file in music attach
- show profile and shared music in audio attach, while not searching
- support webpage preview in miniapps sharing
- fix topic icon cut in profile
